title: Use the MetaMates desktop app
subtitle: MetaMates is a local Electron app, not a web app. Browser mode cannot access your vault, agents, or terminal.
browserHint: You opened the dev URL in a browser (e.g. localhost:3000). Use the Electron desktop window instead, or find MetaMates on the taskbar.
preloadFailedSubtitle: The Electron window opened but the preload bridge is missing. Quit MetaMates completely and run npm run electron:dev again.
footer: If already installed, launch the MetaMates desktop app. The /mobile page is only for clip-saving, not the main entry.
